errors: No human restore evidence artifact has been submitted.

blockerClassifications.title: Disaster recovery
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Human-observed restore drill evidence with sanitized RPO/RTO and post-restore checks.
forbiddenProofTypes: simulated restore proof represented as completed disaster recovery
template-only validation represented as completed restore evidence
real PII or raw credit reports
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Use simulated proof only for autonomous guard coverage; human operator still must perform a restore drill and provide sanitized signed evidence.

blockerClassifications.title: Production ingest runtime
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: SIMULATED worker queue-drain proof exists and a default-off production-scoped bounded activation plan is guarded by tests; actual production activation and queue-depth evidence are still required before production-fixed status.
forbiddenProofTypes: production queue mutation without explicit production apply guards
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep production worker execution default-off; use dry-run first, then only run bounded production apply after explicit operator approval and record queue-depth before/after evidence.

blockerClassifications.title: Load/concurrency proof
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: SIMULATED local load evidence now exists; repeated measured local or staging load evidence with throughput, latency, queue, OCR, PDF, and DB observations is still required.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED load represented as production proof
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Use SIMULATED output only as local capacity evidence; collect repeated bounded local or staging capacity evidence before any scale claim.

blockerClassifications.title: Packet PDF scaling
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Automated proof that packet PDF cache misses are bounded by a synchronous envelope with duplicate collapse, timeout, overload failure evidence, send-route provider-free failure, cache hit behavior, invalidation behavior, and non-owner denial.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/packet-pdf-cache.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED cache-miss proof represented as production-at-scale proof
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep the bounded synchronous envelope evidence current; collect staged target-environment capacity evidence before making any production-at-scale claim.

blockerClassifications.title: Ingest cleanup/data safety
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Automated proof that default failed-ingest cleanup is non-destructive, marks remediation-required state, preserves artifacts/tradelines/evidence, and keeps any retained destructive path explicitly confirmed and production-refusing.
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep the retained destructive helper classified as guarded residual risk: it is not default, requires explicit confirmation, records lifecycle evidence, and refuses production-like environments.

blockerClassifications.title: Historical raw report bytes
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Non-destructive inventory and remediation plan for old inline rows while new rows stay reference-based.
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Use the sanitized inventory to create a reviewed remediation plan without moving data silently.

blockerClassifications.title: Bureau communication storage
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Automated storage adapter proof for new bureau attachments plus compatibility proof for old inline records.
forbiddenProofTypes: raw attachment bytes in DB evidence
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep list endpoints metadata-only and handle any legacy inline rows through an approved historical remediation plan.

blockerClassifications.title: Response operations maturity
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Soak, scheduler boundary, SIMULATED alert dry-run, purge/archive, backfill, and remediation evidence. Live scheduler, purge/archive, and historical backfill remain unproven.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/alerts-dry-run.spec.ts
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Use SIMULATED alert dry-run only as response-ops evidence; live scheduler, purge/archive, and historical backfill still need bounded operator proof.

blockerClassifications.title: Observability/alerting
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Sanitized dashboard metrics plus SIMULATED external alert dry-run/mock proof now exist; live external alert proof or accepted exclusion remains required for operations.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/alerts-dry-run.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED alert proof represented as live alert delivery
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep live external alerting disabled unless separately configured and proven; use this dry-run plus an accepted exclusion if no provider is used.

blockerClassifications.title: Migration governance
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Release-visible non-mutating migration governance and runtime ensure drift evidence now; reviewed additive ledger cutover and hard gate remain future work.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/migration-checker.spec.ts
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep runtime ensure residuals release-visible and convert them to reviewed additive migration ledger entries one workstream at a time.

blockerClassifications.title: Production deployment parity
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Workflow unit tests, read-only production-safe probe evidence, local/staging synthetic owner-denial evidence, default-off production worker path evidence, and human-observed production evidence; rollback proof remains incomplete.
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep production probes read-only, keep seeded privacy smokes local/staging-only, and collect separate rollback plus approved production worker dry-run/apply evidence before calling deployment parity complete.

blockerClassifications.title: OCR route-local validation shape
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: OCR shared upload-validation proof plus valid-fixture output-stability evidence.
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep OCR validation aligned with shared upload boundaries and preserve valid PDF extraction output in regression tests.

blockerClassifications.title: Parser-test list sensitive field
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Metadata-only parser-test list proof plus admin-only raw text detail/export proof.
forbiddenProofTypes: raw extracted text in list evidence
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep parser-test list metadata-only; use admin-only get/export paths for raw extracted text workflows and keep UI detail hydration covered by tests.

blockerClassifications.title: Consumer signature list sensitive field
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Metadata-only consumer-signature list proof plus owner/admin get-by-id signature data proof.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/api/high-growth-list-limits.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: signature image data in list evidence
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep signature list metadata-only; use owner/admin get-by-id detail when signature image data is required.

blockerClassifications.title: Hidden-risk list semantics
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Design/evidence artifact for hidden-risk aggregate and stale-suppression semantics; full bounded pagination remains a separate UI/query task.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/api/high-growth-list-limits.spec.ts
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Split hidden-risk aggregate counts from paginated rows in a separate design task; do not apply a blind limit that changes aggregate semantics.

blockerClassifications.title: DB pool pressure evidence
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: SIMULATED DB pool signal exists; staging-safe load evidence for pool max, latency, active connections, and dashboard observations is still required.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/runtime-tuning-config.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED DB pool signal represented as production proof
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Run bounded staging load and record sanitized real DB pool active/open/latency observations.

blockerClassifications.title: Rate limiter write pressure
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: SIMULATED rate-limit pressure proof exists; bounded staging-safe aggregate DB write metrics are still required.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED pressure represented as production proof
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Collect bounded staging-safe aggregate rate-limit write-pressure signals without real abusive traffic.

blockerClassifications.title: Runtime-size gates
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Runtime-size report with machine-readable warning-only thresholds, visible WARN/WAIVED evidence, and explicit hard-gate semantics before any FAIL can block.
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep WARN/WAIVED runtime-size artifacts visible; only enable hard gates through a later reviewed threshold-policy change.

blockerClassifications.title: Heavy PDF/OCR dependencies
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Policy-bound WARN/WAIVED baseline for heavy PDF/OCR dependencies plus OCR deterministic regression proof for any future dependency or Docker package change.
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep heavy PDF/OCR dependency size warnings visible; defer dependency isolation or replacement until a separately tested OCR/PDF/parser task.

blockerClassifications.title: Production-safe privacy probe depth
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Local/staging synthetic owner-denial proof plus human-observed read-only production probe evidence. Synthetic owner-denial is not production mutation proof.
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Run read-only production-safe probes and local/staging synthetic owner-denial smoke; do not create production fixtures for deeper owner-denial proof.

blockerClassifications.title: Ingest observability release gating
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Release evidence capture records exact commands, production worker readiness evidence, dashboard skips, and explicit dashboard-PASS limitations.
forbiddenProofTypes: release gate changes in this framework
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep exact release evidence commands visible in production-scale evidence, production worker readiness evidence, promotion pack output, and operator dashboard semantics; dashboard PASS alone is not release evidence.

blockerClassifications.title: Retention archive/restore proof
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: SIMULATED retention archive/restore lifecycle proof exists, but human-observed physical archive/restore lifecycle evidence remains required.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED retention proof represented as physical archive/restore completion
physical purge represented as recoverable without proof
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Use SIMULATED proof only for autonomous guard coverage; complete human-observed physical archive/restore lifecycle evidence before any production recoverability claim.

blockerClassifications.title: Public routes inventory risk
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Executable route auth contract proof that public legacy handlers remain classified, retired public routes stay reset/410, and public inventory changes require explicit test updates.
forbiddenProofTypes: public route behavior change without contract
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep route auth contract strict, pin the public inventory, and fail on retired public route revival or unclassified endpoint drift.

blockerClassifications.title: Documentation drift
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Promotion pack and registry evidence must detect stale audit/tracker commit references and keep blocker data aligned with the controlling audit before promotion.
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Run the promotion pack after each scoped blocker task, use its stale-reference findings, and align tracker/audit/evidence references before any promotion decision.

blockerClassifications.title: Dashboard default SKIP semantics
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Dashboard and promotion-pack reports distinguish PASS, FAIL, SKIP, SIMULATED, and HUMAN_REQUIRED while recording exact commands, skipped checks, and dashboard PASS limitation.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/alerts-dry-run.spec.ts
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep release evidence labeled by exact commands and visible SKIP/SIMULATED/HUMAN_REQUIRED rows, not dashboard headline status; promotion pack validation must fail if SKIP is treated as PASS.

readinessClassification.reason: Critical/high, simulated-only, human-required, partial, or open blockers remain.

requiredStatements: SIMULATED proof is not production proof.
Dashboard PASS alone is not complete release evidence when checks are skipped.
Codex must not promote readiness classification beyond the evidence in this pack.
